texto: Don’t settle… wait for the one who treats you like an investment
autor: not a test drive. Someone who inspires you to be at your best… One who looks beyond your outer beauty and falls in love with your soul.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a not a test drive. Someone who inspires you to be at your best… One who looks beyond your outer beauty and falls in love with your soul.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Don’t settle… wait for the one who treats you like an investment” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, steve-maraboli, settle pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
